docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,882.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SILIEZAR, GRACE IRMA AKA LANDAVERDE,IRMA GRACIELA- ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
